attacking_style: Lacks a consistent attacking pattern; more often a reactive rider who follows moves rather than initiating decisive attacks. When he does attack, struggles to create sufficient separation or gain cooperation from rivals.
team_tactics: Movistar appears to provide limited domestique support in critical moments, leaving him tactically isolated in GC battles. Pre-race preparation has shown notable failures (Lombardia, LBL illness).
terrain_preference: Performs best on punchy, explosive climbing finishes and wet technical descents. Severely exposed on flat time trials and sustained power efforts in third-week Grand Tour stages.
vulnerability: Time trials destroy his GC ambitions (60+ second losses). Race-day illness and preparation failures. Tactical indecision in critical selection moments. Cannot sustain GC defense in third week against pure power riders.
key_patterns: Repeatedly loses significant time to strong time-trialists on flat courses, especially late race (3 observations)
Attacks neutralized by rivals unwilling to cooperate; suffers from tactical isolation (2 observations)
Misses critical selections through hesitation or inability to follow explosive moves (3 observations)
Shows vulnerability to race-day illness and preparation failures before key objectives (2 observations)
Can follow elite climbers on mountains but rarely distances them on favorable terrain (4 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 season marred by pre-race elimination at Lombardia and illness at LBL. Failed to convert 2022 Vuelta podium threat into consistent Grand Tour contention.
